{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Also known as the hamster shaper, this is the first time they collaborate with Snail Shell. For every Snail Shell created during the collaboration, a hamster will be sealed away.
|affct=ART
|hard=ATK
|source=Divine Order Chest (0.2%)
|color=purple
|earth=7
|water=7
|fire=7
|wind=5
|form=Demon
|element=Water
|realm=Hellas
|orangehard=DEF
}}
